segments.text: Every time Elon Musk walks into a room,
he asks one question that saves him millions of dollars. While most founders ask, "How do I improve this?" Elon asks,
"Why the [ __ ] does this exist?" Elon has an algorithm that he uses across all of his businesses. [music] And the first part of that algorithm is not automate,
not delegate, not add more things. It's delete. Because [music] the truth is,
you shouldn't automate or delegate something that shouldn't even exist in the [music] first place. So much of the world is going to go and kind of
brainwash you into just adding more and more and more. But I think the real thing you're looking to do is subtract
all of those things to the core essence of what you need to do to be successful in your business, which often times is super simple.
